title: Gurugram、Haryana — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Gurugram、Haryana的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Gurugram是Haryana的一个城市，人口约1,200,000。India’s corporate capital and a major IT and financial hub southwest of Delhi, known for its skyscrapers and modern infrastructure.
